---
title: "Lecture Notes"
---

- [Lecture 01: Introduction](Introduction.qmd){target="_blank"}
- [Lecture 02: Matrix Operations](Lecture02_MatrixOperations.qmd){target="_blank"}
- [Lecture 03: Random Vectors/Matrices](Lecture03_RandomV.qmd){target="_blank"}
- [Lecture 04: A Random Sample from a Multivariate Normal](Lecture04_ARandomSampleFromMultivariate.qmd){target="_blank"}
